title: anchusa longifolia
intro: Anchusa longifolia, also known as large bugloss, is a perennial plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Anchusa longifolia include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Anchusa longifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat various health conditions.
